results.title: GetCompress - PDF & Image - Apps on Google Play
results.content:
GetCompress is a fast, private PDF compressor and image compressor for reducing file size directly on your device.  
  
Compress PDF files, JPG images, PNG images, HEIC photos, and WebP files without uploads, cloud processing, accounts, or tracking. Your documents, photos, scans, receipts, forms, and images stay on your phone.  
  
Use GetCompress to compress PDFs, shrink images, reduce photo size, optimize documents, make files smaller, and prepare attachments for email, messaging apps, online forms, file uploads, portals, storage, and sharing. Everything runs locally on-device, so sensitive files never leave your phone. [...] • Premium upgrade for advanced controls and no ads  
  
Unlike online PDF compressor tools and cloud image compressor apps, GetCompress keeps compression private and local. No file uploads, no waiting for cloud processing, no account signup, and no data collection.  
  
Whether you need to compress a PDF, reduce image size, shrink photos, optimize scanned documents, meet upload limits, send smaller email attachments, save storage space, or share files securely, GetCompress gives you fast, private PDF and image compression on your phone. [...] Compress files in seconds with a simple safe-to-strong compression slider, or use advanced compression controls for precise file size reduction. Reduce PDF size while keeping text readable, preserve document quality, optimize scanned PDFs, compress photos, resize image output, remove metadata, downsample DPI, convert to grayscale, and adjust JPEG quality.  
  
GetCompress is built for everyday file compression, PDF optimization, image size reduction, document sharing, storage cleanup, and secure offline compression.  
  
Key features:  
• PDF compressor for reducing PDF file size  
• Image compressor for JPG, PNG, HEIC, and WebP  
• Compress PDF files directly on your device  
• Compress photos and images without uploading  
• Offline file compression with no internet required

# GetCompress

AvatarPetr Samokhin
50 Installs

Overview

GetCompress logo

# GetCompress

Quickly compress videos, images, GIFs, and PDFs in batches: enjoy up to 90% smaller files with minimal quality loss, all offline and secure on your Mac or PC.

## Prerequisites

GetCompress installation is required to use this extension

## Commands [...] ## Screenshots

GetCompress main window screenshot GetCompress quick compression command screenshot GetCompress regular compression command screenshot

Media Converter

This extension converts video, image, and audio files using FFmpeg [...] ## Commands

 Import Files
  + Add the selected files to GetCompress for further compression or conversion.
 Compress Files quickly
  + Hit enter and compress the selected files straight away, using the saved presets in GetCompress, or choose a preset or quality from dropdown optional arguments.
  + Note: actual preset names are unavailable here because Raycast does not allow dynamic arguments for commands without opening a separate screen. Instead, you select presets by index, following the same ordering that you see in your app.
 Compress Files
  + Compress selected files after selecting quality, output format or presets
  + More options are available here, as presets names and quality values are fetched from GetCompress data.

## Screenshots

results.title: Best PNG Compressor Alternatives: Find the Perfect Tool for Your Needs - ShortPixel Blog
results.content:
Like most basic online tools, it lacks advanced features – no compression level control, no WordPress integration, no format conversion. It handles the essentials and nothing more.

Best for: Casual users who need quick, no-frills compression without learning a new tool.

Alternative recommendation: ShortPixel’s online compressor offers the same simplicity with added power – three compression levels, larger batch support, and optional WordPress integration.

## Key features to compare when choosing an alternative

Not sure which PNG compressor alternative is right for you?

Here are the key features to evaluate:

The best alternative depends on your specific needs, but evaluating these features will help you make an informed choice. [...] ## How to compress PNG images with ShortPixel (step-by-step)

Ready to try one of the best PNG compressor alternatives? Here’s exactly how to use ShortPixel’s online compression tool.

### Step 1: Navigate to ShortPixel’s online compressor

Head over to ShortPixel’s Online Image Compression tool. The interface is clean and straightforward – you’ll see everything you need right on the homepage.

### Step 2: Choose your compression level

shortpixel compress level

ShortPixel offers three compression modes to match your needs:

Select your preferred compression level at the top of the page. If you’re unsure, Glossy is a safe bet that delivers excellent results for most use cases.

### Step 3: Adjust additional settings (optional)

online png compressor [...] ShortPixel Blog
ShortPixel Blog

# Best PNG Compressor Alternatives: Find the Perfect Tool for Your Needs

Andrei Alba
best png compressor alternatives

Images are the backbone of modern websites, but PNG files can quickly become a bottleneck if they’re not optimized.

If you’ve been using the same PNG compressor for a while, you might be missing out on better features, faster compression, or tools that fit your workflow more seamlessly.

Whether you’re looking for a WordPress-friendly option, a desktop tool, or a free online compressor, there’s an alternative out there that’ll work perfectly for you.
